prompt: A photorealistic travel selfie shot from a low angle directly beneath the Eiffel Tower in Paris on a bright cloudless day, with the tower rising dramatically overhead and centered in perfect vertical symmetry against a vivid blue sky. In the foreground, a young woman with medium brown shoulder-length straight hair stands very close to the camera, holding the phone slightly below chest level for an upward-facing selfie perspective. Her face is mostly neutral and relaxed, with a casual candid vacation-photo feel. She wears a fitted ribbed strapless tube top in light pink, high-waisted white jeans, and 2 thin layered silver necklaces. Her skin is warmly lit by strong midday sunlight, with crisp natural shadows from the tower structure and subtle highlights on her shoulders and collarbone. Frame the subject from mid-thigh to head, with one arm extended toward the camera in a natural selfie pose. Emphasize realistic smartphone photography, sharp architectural detail in the iron lattice beneath the Eiffel Tower, authentic tourist snapshot composition, natural body proportions, clean summer styling, and high-detail photorealism. Make it look like a real handheld vacation selfie of a stylish young woman in Paris, not a studio image.
